name: GetSettlement
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific settlement by its ID or bank reference. Returns complete settlement details including the total amount, status, periods breakdown by payment method, and related transaction information. You can use either the Mollie settlement ID (e.g., 'stl_jDk30akdN') or the bank reference (e.g., '1234567.2404.03').

settlement_id.description: The ID of the settlement to retrieve (e.g., 'stl_jDk30akdN') or the bank reference (e.g., '1234567.2404.03').
